title: Invalid expression in Telegram node due to missing trigger
symptom: The workflow throws an 'Invalid expression' error when executed, indicating that the expression cannot be resolved.
applies_when: Using Telegram nodes in a subworkflow
Referencing a value from a trigger node
not_this_if: The workflow is executed directly without subworkflows
root_cause: The error occurs because the Telegram Trigger node is not available in the subworkflow context, leading to unresolved expressions that reference its output.
fix_steps: Open the Telegram node settings in the subworkflow
Update the expression to reference the correct node output
agent_instruction: Change the expression to reference the correct node output in the subworkflow.
